libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: In a JVM test, use the JDK `ToolProvider.getSystemJavaCompiler()` to compile temporary sources containing a `package-info.java` annotated with `@io.vertx.docgen.Document` and documented types. Explicitly install `new DocGenProcessor(new JavaDocGenerator())` as the processor, pass `-Adocgen.output=<temporary-output-directory>`, and assert the generated `.adoc` content/file. Do not rely on `DocGenProcessor` service loading: this artifact does not package a generator service registration.
risks: Version 0.9.4 targets Java 8 and reports `RELEASE_8`; current JDK compilation may emit a source-version warning. Its optional Java-8 `tools.jar` POM dependency is not needed when tests run on a full modern JDK with `jdk.compiler`.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: This is a Java annotation-processor library; meaningful coverage requires compiling annotated temporary sources and asserting generated documentation output.
